response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of broad full-stack experience and some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the resume does not demonstrate the Director-level individual contributor profile this role requires. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI products or platforms shipped at scale, cloud-platform strategy work, or advising strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge AI adoption. Titles top out at Staff/Senior, and the experience is primarily hands-on product engineering rather than principal-level technical strategy.
strengths: 20+ years of polyglot full-stack, backend, and infrastructure engineering experience
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators/frameworks
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating long-term ownership and Kubernetes deployment
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or AI products/platforms shipped at scale
No evidence of Director-level IC scope, cloud-strategy work, or advising strategic customers/partners
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no clear entrepreneurial-within-large-org track record

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC scope
Long, varied engineering tenure with recent AI-agent tooling exposure
